title: Preposiciones básicas
communication_goal: Usar preposiciones básicas en situaciones cotidianas.
cefr_objectives: Can use basic language related to preposiciones básicas.
explanation_es: Este tema desarrolla preposiciones básicas mediante práctica guiada y comunicación contextual.

lessons.title: In, on and under
lessons.objective: Ubicar objetos con in, on y under.

activities.prompt: The keys are ___ the bag.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Las llaves están dentro del bolso.

activities.prompt: The book is ___ the table.
activities.feedback_incorrect: El libro está sobre la mesa.

activities.prompt: The cat is ___ the chair.
activities.feedback_incorrect: El gato está debajo de la silla.

activities.prompt: is / The / bag / under / table / the
activities.correct_answer: The bag is under the table.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Usa noun + is + preposition + place.

activities.prompt: The phone is in the table.
activities.correct_answer: The phone is on the table.
activities.feedback_correct: El teléfono está sobre la superficie.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Para una superficie usa on.

activities.prompt: The pen is in the box.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Escucha in the box.

activities.prompt: in the bag, on the table, under the chair
activities.feedback_incorrect: Practica cada grupo lentamente.

activities.prompt: The wallet is on the desk. The keys are in the drawer.
activities.question: Where are the keys?
activities.feedback_correct: Las llaves están dentro del cajón.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca la segunda frase.

activities.prompt: Write six sentences using in, on and under.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Clasifica dentro, superficie y debajo.

activities.prompt: Tell the AI where three objects are in a room.
activities.feedback_correct: La información permite encontrar los objetos.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Usa in, on o under según la posición.

lessons.title: Next to, behind and in front of

activities.prompt: The chair is ___ the desk.
activities.feedback_correct: Next to significa al lado de.
activities.feedback_incorrect: La silla está al lado del escritorio.

activities.prompt: The garden is ___ the house.
activities.feedback_incorrect: El jardín está detrás de la casa.

activities.prompt: The car is ___ the house.
activities.feedback_correct: In front of significa delante de.
activities.feedback_incorrect: El carro está delante de la casa.

activities.prompt: is / The / bank / next to / library / the
activities.correct_answer: The bank is next to the library.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Usa noun + is + next to + place.

activities.prompt: The school is behind of the park.
activities.correct_answer: The school is behind the park.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Quita of después de behind.

activities.prompt: The bus is in front of the hotel.
activities.feedback_correct: In front of indica posición delantera.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Escucha in front of.

activities.prompt: next to, behind the house, in front of the store
activities.feedback_incorrect: Practica cada grupo antes de unirlo.

activities.prompt: The cafe is next to the bank. The hotel is behind the bank.
activities.question: Where is the hotel?
activities.feedback_correct: El hotel está detrás del banco.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca la segunda frase.

activities.prompt: Write six sentences using next to, behind and in front of.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Usa la preposición completa.

activities.prompt: Tell the AI where three places are relative to each other.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Describe cada lugar con respecto a otro.

lessons.title: Between, near and far from
lessons.objective: Ubicar lugares y objetos con relaciones espaciales adicionales.

activities.prompt: The cafe is ___ the bank and the hotel.
activities.feedback_correct: Between se usa entre dos lugares.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Hay dos referencias: bank y hotel.

activities.prompt: The school is ___ the station.
activities.feedback_incorrect: La escuela está cerca de la estación.

activities.prompt: The village is far ___ the city.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Usa far from para distancia.

activities.prompt: is / The / shop / between / bank / the / and / cafe / the
activities.correct_answer: The shop is between the bank and the cafe.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Between conecta dos lugares con and.

activities.prompt: The park is between the school.
activities.correct_answer: The park is between the school and the bank.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Añade una segunda referencia y and.

activities.prompt: The museum is near the station.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Escucha near.

activities.prompt: between the bank and the cafe; far from the city
activities.feedback_incorrect: Marca between y from.

activities.prompt: The hotel is near the airport but far from the city center.
activities.question: What is far from the hotel?
activities.feedback_correct: La respuesta está después de far from.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca la segunda relación.

activities.prompt: Write five sentences using between, near and far from.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Between debe tener dos lugares.

activities.prompt: Explain where a cafe, station and hotel are using near, between and far from.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Usa cada preposición con su estructura completa.

lessons.title: Integrated location task
lessons.objective: Describir un lugar y dar indicaciones con preposiciones básicas.

activities.prompt: The bank is next to the cafe, behind the hotel and near the station.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Escucha next to, behind y near.

activities.prompt: The library is ___ the school and the bank.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Aparecen dos referencias.

activities.prompt: The store is next the bank.
activities.correct_answer: The store is next to the bank.
activities.feedback_correct: La expresión completa es next to.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Añade to.

activities.prompt: is / The / station / near / airport / the
activities.correct_answer: The station is near the airport.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Usa subject + is + near + place.

activities.prompt: The cafe is next to the bank. The hotel is behind the station.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Practica cada bloque de ubicación.

activities.prompt: The museum is between the bank and the park. It is near the station.
activities.question: Where is the museum?
activities.correct_answer: Between the bank and the park, near the station.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca between y near.

activities.prompt: Describe a small neighborhood with at least seven prepositions.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Combina in, on, under, next to, behind, between y near.

activities.prompt: Give directions from a hotel to a station, cafe and museum using basic prepositions.
activities.feedback_correct: La IA evalúa precisión y utilidad.
activities.feedback_incorrect: La IA pide aclarar una ubicación.

activities.prompt: Explain where five real objects or places are around you.
activities.feedback_correct: Aplicaste las preposiciones a tu entorno.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Observa primero y elige la relación correcta.

activities.prompt: Describe a map, answer three location questions and give directions to one place.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Repasa la preposición relacionada con el error.
